compiled_state.title: Write RED structural tests for platform-matrix pull_request trigger broadening
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story DD Coverage
This task is responsible for satisfying the following story done definitions:
- DD4: Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic (workflow file structural test verifying the pull_request trigger has no narrow path filter)

## TDD Requirement
Write `tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh` with four failing tests:
- `test_pull_request_trigger_has_no_paths_filter` — asserts the pull_request trigger in `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` has no `paths:` key; fails RED because the file currently has a narrow paths filter
- `test_strategy_has_continue_on_error` — asserts `jobs.ticket-platform-tests.strategy.continue-on-error` is `true`; fails RED because the key is absent
- `test_three_leg_names_in_workflow` — asserts all three matrix leg names (`linux-bash4`, `macos-bash3`, `alpine-busybox`) appear under `jobs.ticket-platform-tests.strategy.matrix.include[*].name`; passes against current file (names already present)
- `test_required_checks_txt_exists_and_contains_leg_names` — asserts `.github/required-checks.txt` exists and contains all three leg names; fails RED because the file does not yet exist

Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` has a `paths:` block under `pull_request` and `.github/required-checks.txt` does not exist
- When `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh` is executed
- Then `test_pull_request_trigger_has_no_paths_filter`, `test_strategy_has_continue_on_error`, and `test_required_checks_txt_exists_and_contains_leg_names` all fail (RED)

Test uses `python3 yaml.safe_load` to parse the workflow YAML (same pattern as `tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh`) and `test -f` / `grep` for the required-checks.txt assertions.

Fuzzy match note: source file is `ticket-platform-matrix.yml` (normalized: `ticketplatformmatrixyml`); test file is `test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh` (normalized: `testticketplatformmatrixtriggersh`). Source normalized form is NOT a substring of test normalized form (yml vs sh suffix difference means `ticketplatformmatrixyml` not in `testticketplatformmatrixtriggersh`). A `.test-index` entry is REQUIRED.

## Implementation Notes
- Follow the exact pattern of `tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh`: `_snapshot_fail`, `assert_eq`, `assert_pass_if_clean`, `print_summary`
- Source `tests/lib/assert.sh` at the top
- Use `set -uo pipefail`
- Set executable bit: `chmod +x tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh`
- WORKFLOW_FILE is `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml` relative to repo root
- REQUIRED_CHECKS_FILE is `.github/required-checks.txt` relative to repo root

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits non-zero (RED state confirmed — test file itself must be green to commit; use RED marker for the source workflow file)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh; echo "exit: $?"
- [ ] `tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh
- [ ] Test file contains exactly 4 test functions (one per assertion above)
  Verify: grep -c 'assert_pass_if_clean' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh | awk '{exit ($1 != 4)}'
- [ ] `test_pull_request_trigger_has_no_paths_filter` fails against the unmodified workflow file
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-matrix-trigger.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*pull_request_trigger_has_no_paths_filter\|pull_request_trigger_has_no_paths_filter.*FAIL'
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED marker for `.github/workflows/ticket-platform-matrix.yml`
  Verify: grep 'ticket-platform-matrix.yml' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes (exit 0) ignoring the known-RED test
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci || true

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
